title: Mukia scabrella
taxonomy: Mukia scabrella is classified under the family Cucurbitaceae and the genus Mukia. This classification places it within the order Cucurbitales, a group of flowering plants known for their characteristic fruits and leaves. The family Cucurbitaceae includes various types of gourds, melons, and cucumbers. Mukia scabrella is a member of this diverse group, which comprises around 98 genera and approximately 960 species.
